title: Planning for post-quantum cryptography
summary: ACSC guidance on planning the migration to post-quantum cryptography, covering the creation and analysis of quantum-resistant cryptographic algorithms.

title: Stay ahead of the quantum threat with post-quantum cryptography
summary: News item from the Australian Cyber Security Centre urging organisations to prepare for the quantum threat by adopting quantum-resistant cryptographic algorithms.

title: Information Security Manual: Guidelines for cryptography
summary: Cryptography chapter of ASD's Information Security Manual, including provisions for post-quantum algorithms and post-quantum/traditional hybrid schemes.

title: Quantum technology primer: Computing
summary: Primer on quantum computing noting that as cryptographically relevant quantum computers emerge, organisations will need to rely on post-quantum cryptography.

title: Budget estimates question on notice BE24-0018 (Legal and Constitutional Affairs)
summary: 2024-25 Budget estimates question-on-notice response stating that entities will be encouraged to prepare for the post-quantum future by reviewing data holdings and developing a plan.

title: Senate estimates committee Hansard, 2 December 2025
summary: Senate estimates committee transcript in which senators question the Home Affairs portfolio on its handling of post-quantum cryptography.

title: State of Australian Quantum Report 2024, Appendix A: Support for quantum across the Australian Government
summary: Appendix to the State of Australian Quantum Report 2024 mapping government support for quantum, noting a Plan of Action that deals explicitly with adopting post-quantum cryptographic standards.

title: National Quantum Strategy: Quantum technologies
summary: Section of Australia's National Quantum Strategy covering the spectrum of quantum technologies, including an indicative 5-to-10-year horizon for post-quantum cryptography.

title: List of Critical Technologies in the National Interest: Quantum technologies
summary: Quantum technologies entry in the List of Critical Technologies in the National Interest, naming post-quantum cryptography among priority technologies for improved data security.

title: Critical Technologies Challenge Program round 1 projects
summary: Announcement of round 1 projects funded under the Critical Technologies Challenge Program, including post-quantum cryptography supportive hardware to reduce eavesdropping risks.

title: The Quantum Safe Transition: Reality, Hurdles and Pathways
summary: CSIRO report examining why transitioning to post-quantum cryptography is a priority for Australia and the realities, hurdles and pathways of the quantum-safe transition.

title: Post quantum safe transition and cyber resilience
summary: CSIRO research programme providing guidance, tools and frameworks to identify critical assets, assess cryptographic dependencies and plan post-quantum migration pathways.

title: Quantum shift: How are Australian organisations navigating the quantum frontier?
summary: CSIRO report on how Australian organisations are navigating quantum readiness, with transitioning to post-quantum cryptography among the key focus areas of proactive organisations.

title: Australian Signals Directorate releases the Annual Cyber Threat Report 2024-25
summary: ASD news release announcing the Annual Cyber Threat Report 2024-25, urging organisations to prepare for post-quantum cryptography.

title: ASD Science, Technology, Innovation and Research Priorities
summary: ASD's published research priorities, listing mathematics and post-quantum cryptography among its priority research areas alongside quantum computing and algorithms.

title: Parliamentary inquiry document on post-quantum cryptography implementation timelines
summary: Document held in the Parliament of Australia document store stating that the time required to implement post-quantum cryptography will vary with a Commonwealth entity's cyber security posture. Issuing body is not identifiable from the listing.

title: Submission: the impact of new and emerging information and communications technologies
summary: Submission to a parliamentary inquiry on new and emerging information and communications technologies that references post-quantum encryption. Issuing body is not identifiable from the listing.

title: Enabling post-quantum cryptography (PQC) migration (industry PhD opportunity)
summary: CSIRO industry PhD project listing on developing techniques for the migration to post-quantum cryptography to secure critical infrastructure from quantum attacks.
